content:textarea:6:96.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:6:96.html: Our new location is 1740 S. Horner Blvd.
content:textarea:6:96.content: Our new location is 1740 S. Horner Blvd.
content:textarea:6:96.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:66:94-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:7:25.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:7:25.html: The Salvation Army of Lee County serves those in need in our community by providing food and utility assistance and other services to meet basic needs.
content:textarea:7:25.content: The Salvation Army of Lee County serves those in need in our community by providing food and utility assistance and other services to meet basic needs.
content:textarea:7:25.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:66:94-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:8:16.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:8:16.html: At The Salvation Army of Lee County, we fight poverty through programs and services that provide the resources necessary to become self-sufficient and productive members of our community.
content:textarea:8:16.content: At The Salvation Army of Lee County, we fight poverty through programs and services that provide the resources necessary to become self-sufficient and productive members of our community.
content:textarea:8:16.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:66:94-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:9:29.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:9:29.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:66:94-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:10:96.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:10:96.html: When you support The Salvation Army, you are making a difference in the lives of people in Lee County, NC. The Salvation Army is committed to using funds locally to support vital programs to help those in need.
content:textarea:10:96.content: When you support The Salvation Army, you are making a difference in the lives of people in Lee County, NC. The Salvation Army is committed to using funds locally to support vital programs to help those in need.
content:textarea:10:96.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:66:94-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:wysiwyg_basic:12:92.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:12:92.html: Donate financially online or call us at 1-800-SAL-ARMY (725-2769). Checks may be made payable to The Salvation Army and sent to 1740 S. Horner Blvd. Sanford, NC 27330.

content:wysiwyg_basic:12:92.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:66:94-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:wysiwyg_basic:15:85.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:15:85.html: We are happy to receive your donations of lightly-worn clothing and other household items at our Thrift Store (305 South Steele St. Sanford, NC 27330). For more information, call 919-776-2769.

content:wysiwyg_basic:24:96.html: There are many gift types that can help establish a Legacy of Love that will directly benefit those that The Salvation Army helps. For those options, please click here and email our Planned Giving Director for more information.

content:textarea:36:54.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:36:54.html: Our mission is to preach the gospel of Jesus Christ and to meet human needs in His name without discrimination. It would be an honor to pray with you and share with you about Jesus today!
